description: P21 - NG-NL Cy QS (3270 ceding to 3030)

sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '%97'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Crcy, Co, GL, PC, Contract, UWYr, TP, BusCat, Amt1, Amt3, TTY) (Select KeyID, Ledger, Crcy, Co, GL, PC, Contract, UWYr, TP, BusCat, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, '' as TTY from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TTY is NULL group by KeyID, Ledger, Crcy, Co, GL, PC, Contract, UWYr, TP, BusCat)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Crcy, Co, GL, PC, Contract, UWYr, TP, BusCat, Amt1, Amt3) (select KeyID + '-data2' as KeyID, Ledger, Crcy, Co, GL, PC, Contract, UWYr, TP, BusCat, Amt1, Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Crcy, Co, GL, PC, Contract, UWYr, TP, BusCat, TTY, Amt1, Amt3) (select KeyID, Ledger, Crcy, Co, GL, PC, Contract, UWYr, '' as TP, BusCat, TTY, Amt1, Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Crcy, Co, GL, PC, Contract, UWYr, TP, BusCat, TTY, Amt1, Amt3, Flex1) (Select KeyID, Ledger, Crcy, Co, GL, PC, Contract, UWYr, TP, BusCat, TTY, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, 'pass 1' as Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Ledger, Crcy, Co, GL, PC, Contract, UWYr, TP, BusCat, TTY)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Crcy, Co, GL, PC, Contract, UWYr, TP, BusCat, TTY, Amt1, Amt3) (Select x.KeyID, x.Ledger, x.Crcy, x.Co, y.Descr as GL, x.PC, x.Contract, x.UWYr, x.TP, x.BusCat, y.Field2 as TTY, round(x.Amt1 * y.Field3,2) as Amt1, round(x.Amt3 * y.Field3,2) as Amt3 from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables y on x.GL = y.ID and (substring(x.BusCat,1,1) = substring(y.Field1,1,1) or (substring(x.BusCat,1,1) = '' and substring(y.Field1,1,1) = '3'))and y.Table_ID in ('ElimGLmap7','ElimGLmap8') where KeyID = '[batchID]')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Crcy, Co, GL, PC, Contract, UWYr, TP, BusCat, TTY, Amt1, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Ledger, Crcy, Co, '3592502' as GL, PC, Contract, UWYr, TP, BusCat, '990' as TTY, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, round(-Amt3,2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '2829998')

update TransX set Amt2 = f2.Amt1, Amt4 = f2.Amt3 from TransX f1 inner join (Select KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, PC, Contract, UWYr, TP, BusCat, TTY, Amt1, Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'IF') f2 on f1.KeyID = f2.KeyID and f1.Co = f2.Co and f1.GL = f2.GL and f1.PC = f2.PC and f1.Contract = f2.Contract and f1.UWYr = f2.UWYr and f1.TP = f2.TP and f1.BusCat = f2.BusCat and f1.TTY = f2.TTY and f1.Amt1 = f2.Amt1 and f1.Amt3 = f2.Amt3

update TransX set Amt5 = f2.Amt1, Amt6 = f2.Amt3 from TransX f1 inner join (Select KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, PC, Contract, UWYr, TP, BusCat, TTY, Amt1, Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'UG') f2 on f1.KeyID = f2.KeyID and f1.Co = f2.Co and f1.GL = f2.GL and f1.PC = f2.PC and f1.Contract = f2.Contract and f1.UWYr = f2.UWYr and f1.TP = f2.TP and f1.BusCat = f2.BusCat and f1.TTY = f2.TTY and f1.Amt1 = f2.Amt1 and f1.Amt3 = f2.Amt3

update TransX set Amt7 = f2.Amt1, Amt8 = f2.Amt3 from TransX f1 inner join (Select KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, PC, Contract, UWYr, TP, BusCat, TTY, Amt1, Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'US') f2 on f1.KeyID = f2.KeyID and f1.Co = f2.Co and f1.GL = f2.GL and f1.PC = f2.PC and f1.Contract = f2.Contract and f1.UWYr = f2.UWYr and f1.TP = f2.TP and f1.BusCat = f2.BusCat and f1.TTY = f2.TTY and f1.Amt1 = f2.Amt1 and f1.Amt3 = f2.Amt3

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Crcy, Co, GL, PC, Contract, UWYr, TP, BusCat, TTY, Amt1, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Ledger, Crcy, Co, GL, PC, Contract, UWYr, TP, BusCat, TTY, (case when Amt1 > 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, (case when Amt3 > 0 then Amt3 else 0 end) as Amt3, '40' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Crcy, Co, GL, PC, Contract, UWYr, TP, BusCat, TTY, Amt1, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Ledger, Crcy, Co, GL, PC, Contract, UWYr, TP, BusCat, TTY, (case when Amt1 < 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, (case when Amt3 < 0 then Amt3 else 0 end) as Amt3, '50' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL)
Update TransX set Contract = 'SYB2' + SUBSTRING(Contract,8,1) + '095630A' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Contract like 'CY02002_A'
